configuration.aws.credentials.descriptio:
Variables used to configure AWS credentials.

Example: to set the AWS region and profile, add items with keys `AWS_REGION` and `AWS_PROFILE`.
configuration.aws.inferenceProfileRegion:
Override the inference profile region for AWS services.

By default, the inference profile region is derived from `AWS_REGION` (e.g., 'us-east-1' -> 'us'). Use this setting to explicitly specify a different region.

Examples: 'global', 'us', 'eu', 'apac'.
configuration.snowflake.credentials.desc:
Variables used to configure Snowflake Cortex provider.

Example: to set the Snowflake account and connections path, add items with keys `SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT` and `SNOWFLAKE_HOME`.
configuration.snowflake.customHeaders.de: Extra HTTP headers attached to every Snowflake Cortex request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.anthropic.baseUrl.descript: Custom Anthropic API base URL. Overrides the default https://api.anthropic.com/v1 endpoint. Also set automatically from the ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL environment variable.
configuration.anthropic.customHeaders.de: Extra HTTP headers attached to every Anthropic request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.foundry.customHeaders.desc: Extra HTTP headers attached to every Microsoft Foundry request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.openai-api.baseUrl.descrip: Custom OpenAI API base URL. Overrides the default https://api.openai.com/v1 endpoint. Also set automatically from the OPENAI_BASE_URL environment variable.
configuration.openai-api.customHeaders.d: Extra HTTP headers attached to every OpenAI request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.google.baseUrl.description: Custom Gemini API base URL. Overrides the default https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta endpoint. Also set automatically from the GEMINI_BASE_URL environment variable.
configuration.google.customHeaders.descr: Extra HTTP headers attached to every Gemini request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.googleVertex.baseUrl.descr: Custom Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform base URL. Overrides the default https://aiplatform.googleapis.com endpoint. Also set automatically from the GOOGLE_VERTEX_BASE_URL environment variable.
configuration.googleVertex.credentials.d:
Variables used to configure the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform provider.

Example: to set the project and region, add items with keys `GOOGLE_VERTEX_PROJECT` and `GOOGLE_VERTEX_LOCATION`.
configuration.googleVertex.customHeaders: Extra HTTP headers attached to every Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
Base URL for the custom OpenAI-compatible provider endpoint.
configuration.openai-compatible.customHe: Extra HTTP headers attached to every OpenAI-compatible request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.deepseek-api.baseUrl.descr: Custom DeepSeek API base URL. Overrides the default https://api.deepseek.com endpoint. Also set automatically from the DEEPSEEK_BASE_URL environment variable.
configuration.deepseek-api.customHeaders: Extra HTTP headers attached to every DeepSeek request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.databricks.credentials.des:
Variables used to configure the Databricks provider.

Example: to set the Databricks workspace, add an item with key `DATABRICKS_HOST` and the workspace URL as the value.
configuration.databricks.customHeaders.d: Extra HTTP headers attached to every Databricks request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.provider.databricks.enable:
Enable Databricks as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22databricks%22%7D%5D).
configuration.provider.googleVertex.enab:
Enable Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform (formerly Google Vertex AI) as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Restart Positron for the changes to take effect. Then, authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22google-cloud%22%7D%5D).
Enable DeepSeek as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22deepseek-api%22%7D%5D).
Enable Anthropic as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Restart Positron for the changes to take effect. Then, authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22anthropic-api%22%7D%5D).
configuration.provider.githubCopilot.ena:
Enable GitHub Copilot as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Restart Positron for the changes to take effect. Then, authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22copilot-auth%22%7D%5D).
configuration.provider.amazonBedrock.ena:
Enable Amazon Bedrock as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Restart Positron for the changes to take effect. Then, authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22amazon-bedrock%22%7D%5D).
configuration.provider.snowflakeCortex.e:
Enable Snowflake Cortex as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Restart Positron for the changes to take effect. Then, authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22snowflake-cortex%22%7D%5D).
configuration.provider.openAI.enable.des:
Enable OpenAI as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Restart Positron for the changes to take effect. Then, authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22openai-api%22%7D%5D).
configuration.provider.customProvider.en:
Enable Custom Provider as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Restart Positron for the changes to take effect. Then, authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22openai-compatible%22%7D%5D).
configuration.provider.positAI.enable.de:
Enable Posit AI as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Restart Positron for the changes to take effect. Then, authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22posit-ai%22%7D%5D).
Enable Microsoft Foundry (formerly Azure Foundry) as a language model provider for Positron's AI features. Also supports Azure OpenAI.

Restart Positron for the changes to take effect. Then, authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22ms-foundry%22%7D%5D).
configuration.provider.google.enable.des:
Enable Google Gemini as a language model provider for Positron's AI features.

Restart Positron for the changes to take effect. Then, authenticate to the provider in the [language model provider dialog](command:authentication.configureProviders?%5B%7B%22preselectedProviderId%22%3A%22google%22%7D%5D).
configuration.models.overrides.anthropic:
Model overrides for Anthropic provider.

These models will be used instead of retrieving the model listing from the provider. Each model must have a `name` (display name) and `identifier` (model ID for API calls). Optionally specify `maxInputTokens` and `maxOutputTokens`.

Requires a restart to take effect.
configuration.models.overrides.amazonBed:
Model overrides for Amazon Bedrock provider.

These models will be used instead of retrieving the model listing from the provider. Each model must have a `name` (display name) and `identifier` (model ID for API calls). Optionally specify `maxInputTokens` and `maxOutputTokens`.

Requires a restart to take effect.

configuration.aiExcludes.description: A list of [glob patterns](https://aka.ms/vscode-glob-patterns) to exclude from AI features. Files matching these patterns will not have their contents sent to AI providers for inline completions or chat context. Patterns without a `/` will match against the filename only (e.g., `*.py` matches all Python files). Use `**/` prefix for explicit recursive matching.
configuration.models.include.description:
Enforce strict restrictions on which language models are available. When configured, **only models matching these patterns will be available**—other models will be excluded entirely.

Matching is case-insensitive and supports wildcards (`*`) and regular expressions for advanced filtering.

**Note:** This setting does not affect GitHub Copilot models.

Examples:
- `claude`: Only Claude models are available
- `GPT-4o`: Only this specific model is available
- `^claude.*opus`: Only Claude Opus models (matched by regex) are available
commands.configureProviders.title: Configure Language Model Providers
